Mismatch / needs repairing: Refuse to run if the latest successful Dropbox backup did not start after the latest finished ops.prune_daily attempt, ops.r2_core_snapshot attempt, and any previous repair-mode ops.history_integrity attempt. Also refuse if any relevant writer is still running.
Correct / repair not required: Run when the latest successful Dropbox backup is newer than all relevant completed writer attempts.
What later tasks read: R2_history_backup is accepted as the fresh base for the run.

Scope / rule: Per day, connector, pollutant and timeseries
Mismatch / needs repairing: Compare source-cache with Dropbox observs. Rebuild mismatched v2 observ parquet. Save the repaired parquet in the sparse local overlay, upload it to R2 History, GET/read it back, verify it, then add the scope to OBSERVS_CHANGED.
Correct / repair not required: No repair. Do not add the scope to OBSERVS_CHANGED.

Scope / rule: Per affected pollutant, connector and day
Mismatch / needs repairing: For scopes in OBSERVS_CHANGED, rebuild manifests automatically bottom-up. For unchanged scopes in the command range, compare observ parquet and child manifests with existing Dropbox manifests and repair faults. Save repairs in overlay, upload, GET/read back and verify.
Correct / repair not required: No repair for healthy unchanged scopes.
Source used for verification: Changed scopes: overlay + Dropbox combined view. Unchanged scopes: Dropbox observ parquet and manifests.

Mismatch / needs repairing: For days whose observation manifests changed, rebuild index/latest/metadata from the final manifests. For unchanged days in the command range, compare Dropbox day manifests with Dropbox indexes and repair faults. Save repairs in overlay, upload, GET/read back and verify.
Source used for verification: Changed scopes: final manifests from overlay + Dropbox. Unchanged scopes: Dropbox manifests versus Dropbox indexes.
What later tasks read: Final observation metadata from overlay first, Dropbox second.

Scope / rule: Only AQI-eligible pollutants; per day, connector, timeseries and UTC hour
Mismatch / needs repairing: Derive expected AQI UTC hours from final observs. If observs changed, use overlay + Dropbox. Otherwise use Dropbox. Compare with actual aqilevels. Rebuild missing or invalid aqilevels, save in overlay, upload, GET/read back and verify, then add to AQILEVELS_CHANGED.
Correct / repair not required: No repair when every expected eligible UTC hour exists and AQI output is valid.
Source used for verification: Expected hours from final observs; actual AQI from overlay first, Dropbox second.

Scope / rule: Per affected AQI pollutant, connector and day
Mismatch / needs repairing: For scopes in AQILEVELS_CHANGED, rebuild AQI manifests automatically bottom-up. For unchanged scopes in the command range, verify Dropbox AQI manifests against Dropbox AQI parquet and repair faults. Save repairs in overlay, upload, GET/read back and verify.
Correct / repair not required: No repair for healthy unchanged scopes.
Source used for verification: Changed scopes: overlay + Dropbox combined view. Unchanged scopes: Dropbox AQI parquet and manifests.

Mismatch / needs repairing: For days whose AQI manifests changed, rebuild AQI index/latest/metadata from the final manifests. For unchanged days, compare Dropbox AQI day manifests with Dropbox AQI indexes and repair faults. Save repairs in overlay, upload, GET/read back and verify.
Correct / repair not required: No repair for healthy AQI indexes.
Source used for verification: Changed scopes: final AQI manifests from overlay + Dropbox. Unchanged scopes: Dropbox AQI manifests versus Dropbox AQI indexes.
What later tasks read: Final AQI metadata from overlay first, Dropbox second.

Mismatch / needs repairing: If any of the six areas still fails, report the exact remaining scope and fail the run. Do not automatically start a second repair loop.
Correct / repair not required: Finish successfully when observs, observ manifests, observ indexes, aqilevels, AQI manifests and AQI indexes are all verified.
Source used for verification: source-cache for observ truth; verified overlay for generated files; targeted R2 GET/read-back evidence for uploaded objects
What later tasks read: The next daily Dropbox backup becomes the fresh base for the next Integrity run.
